title: HS-01 pair-option word references
description: Curated word -> {gloss, image} map shown on demand for fine-grained pair-option words. Keys are the exact class words used in itempool cell.anchor_word / target_word.

gloss.description: One-line, neutral definition shown to the rater.

image.description: Bundled reference PNG filename served by /api/refs/[name], or null for a gloss-only entry (e.g. a word-confusion case where a photo adds nothing).
